zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Euby是Wiiam Euby的女兒，於1409年出生在英國英格蘭爾瑟 塔波。她於1428年與James Radcliffe在英國藍卡爾拉德克利夫結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1465年在英國達勒姆拉比 卡素享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾拉德克利夫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes Euby是Wiiam Euby的女儿，于1409年出生在英国英格兰爾瑟 塔波。她于1428年与James Radcliffe在英国藍卡爾拉德克利夫结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1465年在英国達勒姆拉比 卡素享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾拉德克利夫。

nameMeanings.name: Euby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Irby  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Irby
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Irby in Lincolnshire, Cheshire, and North Yorkshire, or Ireby (Cumberland and Lancashire), all named from Old Norse Írabýr ‘settlement of the Irish’. Compare Ireton .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Euby was born in 1409, in Nether Tabley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Wiiam Euby. She married James Radcliffe in 1428, in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1465, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Euby est née en 1409, à Nether Tabley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Wiiam Euby. Elle a épousé James Radcliffe en 1428, à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1465, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes Euby wurde 1409 in Nether Tabley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Wiiam Euby geboren. Sie hat 1428 in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England James Radcliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1465 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Raby Castle, Durham, England und wurde in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Eubyは1409年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアネスエル タブリーでWiiam Eubyの娘として生まれた。1428年にイギリスランカシュアイアラドクリフでJames Radcliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1465年にイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアラドクリフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Euby(은)는 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 네터 타블리에서 Wiiam Euby의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1428년 영국 랭카실르 라드c리프에서 James Radcliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1465년 영국 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 라드c리프에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Euby родилась в 1409 г. в местности нетир табли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Wiiam Euby. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Radcliffe в 1428 г. в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1465 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
